testcase.name: shouldSupportLegacyLogMethod
testcase.system-out:
15:46:05.444 [main] ERROR com.google.adk.tools.FunctionTool -- Functions used in tools must have their parameters annotated with @Schema or at least the code must be compiled with the -parameters flag as a fallback. Your function tool will likely not work as expected and exit at runtime.
